name: 一键生成9宫格-剧情版plus-网页版

parts.text:
{
  "content_type": "剧情故事",
  "visual_anchor": {
    "subject_identity": "A handsome young man with long silver-white hair in a topknot, sharp features. He is the protagonist. His opponent is a menacing warrior with dark, spiky hair, wearing ornate black and red armor.",
    "outfit_anchor": "Protagonist wears a white and grey traditional Chinese robe with black accents, black sash, and dark bracers. Antagonist wears ornate black and red armor.",
    "product_anchor": "Not applicable.",
    "scene_anchor": "An ancient Chinese temple courtyard with grey stone tiles marked with circular patterns, ornate architecture in the background, set in a misty mountain environment under an overcast sky."
  },
  "global_style": "photorealistic, cinematic, rich details, realistic lighting, no text, no UI, Wuxia fantasy style",
  "negative_prompts": [
    "extra fingers",
    "deformed hands",
    "identity drift",
    "wrong product logo",
    "new accessories",
    "text overlay",
    "watermark",
    "frame border",
    "gridline",
    "cartoon look"
  ],
  "shots": [
    {
      "shot_index": 1,
      "title": "The Standoff",
      "story_beat": "Establishing the two opponents and the tense atmosphere before the duel begins.",
      "subject": "The white-robed protagonist and the red-armored antagonist.",
      "scene": "The center of the ancient temple courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Tense, focused, imminent conflict.",
      "camera_shot": "Wide establishing shot, eye-level, showing both characters facing each other from a distance.",
      "motion_hint": "Slow camera dolly sideways, robes and hair gently blowing in the wind.",
      "prompt_text": "Cinematic wide shot, a handsome man with long silver-white hair in a white robe faces off against a menacing warrior in black and red armor in the center of a vast, misty temple courtyard. The ground is made of grey stone with etched patterns. The air is thick with tension, dust motes visible in the air. Photorealistic, Wuxia fantasy."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 2,
      "title": "Protagonist's Opening Move",
      "story_beat": "The protagonist initiates the attack, showcasing his power.",
      "subject": "The white-robed protagonist.",
      "scene": "His position in the temple courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Concentrated, powerful, determined.",
      "camera_shot": "Medium shot, from a low angle, focusing on the protagonist.",
      "motion_hint": "Energy particles swirl and converge into his palm, the orb of light grows and pulsates.",
      "prompt_text": "Photorealistic medium shot of the handsome man with silver-white hair, his expression focused. He extends one hand forward, a swirling orb of bright blue energy rapidly materializing in his palm, casting a cool light on his face and white robes. Particles of energy are drawn in from the air around him. The background temple is slightly out of focus."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 3,
      "title": "Antagonist's Retort",
      "story_beat": "The antagonist prepares to counter, revealing his own elemental power.",
      "subject": "The red-armored antagonist.",
      "scene": "His position in the temple courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Confident, aggressive, disdainful.",
      "camera_shot": "Medium close-up on the antagonist, eye-level.",
      "motion_hint": "He smirks as crimson flames erupt around his clenched fist, growing in intensity.",
      "prompt_text": "Cinematic medium close-up of the menacing warrior in black and red armor. He has a confident smirk, his eyes glowing faintly red. His gauntleted fist is clenched, and crimson flames begin to erupt and swirl around his arm, emitting a warm, flickering light. Sparks fly off the flames. Photorealistic, detailed armor."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 4,
      "title": "First Clash",
      "story_beat": "The initial exchange of power, testing each other's strength.",
      "subject": "The two energy attacks colliding.",
      "scene": "Mid-air, between the two combatants.",
      "emotion": "Violent, energetic, explosive.",
      "camera_shot": "Dynamic wide shot, tracking the protagonist's attack as it flies across the courtyard.",
      "motion_hint": "The blue energy beam travels fast, then collides with a burst of red fire, creating a concussive blast of steam and light that ripples outwards.",
      "prompt_text": "Dynamic action wide shot. A brilliant blue energy beam streaks across the temple courtyard, colliding violently with an explosive fireball of red and orange. At the point of impact, there is a blinding flash of white light, and a shockwave of steam and multi-colored energy expands outwards, kicking up dust and cracking the stone floor below. Photorealistic."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 5,
      "title": "Fiery Counterattack",
      "story_beat": "The antagonist presses his advantage with a powerful offensive move.",
      "subject": "The red-armored antagonist.",
      "scene": "The temple courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Fierce, relentless, overwhelming.",
      "camera_shot": "Low-angle medium shot, looking up at the antagonist to make him seem imposing.",
      "motion_hint": "He thrusts his hands forward, sending a massive wave of fire rushing towards the camera.",
      "prompt_text": "Imposing low-angle shot of the warrior in red and black armor. He thrusts both hands forward, unleashing a roaring torrent of crimson fire that rushes towards the viewer, consuming the frame. The heat visibly distorts the air around him, and his armor glows with reflected light. His face is a mask of pure aggression. Photorealistic, intense action."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 6,
      "title": "Protagonist's Defense",
      "story_beat": "The protagonist skillfully defends against the overwhelming attack.",
      "subject": "The white-robed protagonist.",
      "scene": "The temple courtyard, facing the incoming fire wave.",
      "emotion": "Calm, steadfast, resilient.",
      "camera_shot": "Over-the-shoulder shot from behind the protagonist.",
      "motion_hint": "He sweeps his arm in an arc, and a translucent shield of swirling blue energy and wind forms just in time to block the fire wave, which splashes against it violently.",
      "prompt_text": "Cinematic over-the-shoulder shot from behind the white-robed protagonist. He holds a defensive stance as a massive, roaring wave of fire crashes against a translucent, shimmering shield of blue wind-like energy he has conjured. The intense orange light of the fire contrasts with the cool blue of his shield. His white robes billow wildly from the force."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 7,
      "title": "Escalation",
      "story_beat": "Both combatants realize they need to use their ultimate abilities, charging up for a decisive blow.",
      "subject": "Both combatants.",
      "scene": "The courtyard, which is now showing signs of damage.",
      "emotion": "Maximum effort, climactic, immense power.",
      "camera_shot": "Slightly wide Dutch angle shot, capturing both characters in their respective power-up poses.",
      "motion_hint": "The ground cracks and floats up around them. The protagonist's blue energy swirls into a massive sphere above him, while the antagonist summons a giant serpent of pure fire.",
      "prompt_text": "Dutch angle shot showing both duelists powering up. On the left, the white-robed man raises his hands, gathering a massive, crackling sphere of blue lightning energy. On the right, the red-armored warrior summons a colossal serpent made of roaring crimson flames. The stone ground between them cracks and levitates from the sheer energy release. Photorealistic."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 8,
      "title": "Ultimate Collision",
      "story_beat": "The climax of the duel; the most powerful attacks collide in a spectacular explosion.",
      "subject": "The collision of the two ultimate attacks.",
      "scene": "The center of the courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Cataclysmic, blinding, awe-inspiring.",
      "camera_shot": "Extreme wide shot, low angle, showing the sheer scale of the explosion.",
      "motion_hint": "The two attacks meet, and for a split second, there is silence before a massive dome-shaped explosion of purple and white light erupts, obliterating the center of the courtyard and sending a huge shockwave outwards.",
      "prompt_text": "Extreme wide, low-angle shot of the cataclysmic impact. The blue energy sphere and the giant fire serpent collide, creating a blinding, dome-shaped explosion of violet and white light that engulfs the center of the temple courtyard. Debris and massive chunks of the stone floor are thrown high into the air. The temple buildings in the background are silhouetted against the intense light. Photorealistic, epic scale."
    },
    {
      "shot_index": 9,
      "title": "The Aftermath",
      "story_beat": "The result of the ultimate clash, showing both combatants pushed to their limits.",
      "subject": "The two combatants in the ruined courtyard.",
      "scene": "The now-devastated temple courtyard.",
      "emotion": "Exhausted, determined, unresolved.",
      "camera_shot": "Ground-level wide shot, through the settling smoke and dust.",
      "motion_hint": "Camera slowly pushes in as smoke clears, revealing both figures standing, breathing heavily, their clothes torn and singed, readying themselves for the next round.",
      "prompt_text": "Gritty ground-level shot through settling smoke and dust in the destroyed courtyard. The white-robed protagonist and the red-armored antagonist are on opposite sides of a massive crater, both breathing heavily. Their clothes are tattered and singed. They lock eyes across the devastation, bruised but undefeated, preparing to continue the fight. Photorealistic, cinematic."
    }
  ]
}
